use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH SHORT BOWEL SYNDROME WHO ARE DEPENDENT ON PARENTERAL SUPPORT
TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH SHORT BOWEL SYNDROME WHO ARE DEPENDENT ON PARENTERAL SUPPORT

indications.text:
GATTEX® is indicated for the treatment of adults and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older
with Short Bowel Syndrome (SBS) who are dependent on parenteral support.

GATTEX® (teduglutide [rDNA origin]) for injection is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Short Bowel Syndrome (SBS) who are dependent on
parenteral support. [see Clinical Pharmacology 12.2].

GATTEX® is indicated for the treatment of adults and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with
Short Bowel Syndrome (SBS) who are dependent on parenteral support.

GATTEX® (teduglutide [rDNA origin]) for injection is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with Short Bowel Syndrome (SBS) who are dependent on
parenteral support. [see Clinical Pharmacology (12.2)]

GATTEX® is indicated for the treatment of adults and pediatric patients 1 year of age
and older with Short Bowel Syndrome (SBS) who are dependent on parenteral support.
